description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the vevende/ci:latest Docker image with a docker:dind service and three stages: build, tests, and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that caches src/frontend/node_modules and src/frontend/.cache, runs `docker-compose run --rm frontend npm run build`, logs in to registry.gitlab.com with `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com`, builds the image `registry.gitlab.com/mariocesar/tesla:latest` via `docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/mariocesar/tesla:latest .` and pushes it with `docker push registry.gitlab.com/mariocesar/tesla:latest`. In the tests stage add a tests job that simply executes `echo "todo bien!"`. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that starts an ssh agent with `eval $(ssh-agent -s)`, adds the private key using `ssh-add <(echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY")`, and runs an Ansible playbook `ansible-playbook -vvv -i provision/inventory.ini provision/deploy.yml` to deploy the built image. All jobs run on any branch.
